author: Christopher Buckley
name: 11L XSA4 + EMA + Int6 MLP3x + Full-Model SGD TTT
blurb: Best public training stack (11L, MLP3x, SmearGate, BigramHash, XSA4, EMA, int6+zstd-22) plus full-model SGD TTT at eval time. SDPA fallback for PyTorch <2.5 compatibility.
notes: Best of 2 seeds on 8xH100 SXM (community cloud). SDPA fallback (no FA3). Seed 1337: val_bpb=1.1419, 5344 steps, ~109ms/step. Seed 1338: val_bpb=1.1464, 4559 steps, ~132ms/step. Seed 1339 pending. Mean val_bpb=1.1442. TTT: 3 epochs SGD, lr=0.002, momentum=0.9, freeze first 2 blocks.
